name: REST API v1 deep drill
description: 15 route files across maps/layers/features/geojson/tiles/annotations/comments/files. Dual auth (API key Bearer flk_ + share token). Cursor-based pagination. In-memory GeoJSON FIFO cache (200 entries, 30s TTL). Rate limit counters never pruned. File uploads have no quota. Dual auth path causes 2x DB lookups per API key request.
